application.purpose: Public cyber-security and responsible AI learning fieldbook

data_collection.hosting_note: The hosting and network providers may process ordinary request metadata outside this application's code and control.

browser_controls.permissions_policy: camera, geolocation, microphone, payment and USB disabled

csp.reason: The current React Server Components bootstrap uses inline scripts. Enforcement waits for a verified nonce-compatible rollout.

trust_boundaries: hosting edge to Worker and renderer
browser to explicitly selected third-party links
maintainer and CI to production deployment
known_gaps: No application-level request log or security-event store is available.
HTML CSP is report-only until the hydration path supports verified nonces.
Availability and coarse abuse controls are provided by the hosting edge.
Public NFT metadata and token artwork are intentionally enumerable.
